title: boesenbergia alba
intro: Boesenbergia alba, also known as Kaempferia galanga or white ginger, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Boesenbergia alba include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Boesenbergia alba is often prepared in the form of powder, tea, or extract, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
